message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Controls: Master Keybinds & Gameplay 2026",
  description: "Master Bizarre Lineage controls, keybinds, and essential gameplay mechanics with our comprehensive guide for 2026. Optimize your combat and progression!",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/3b82f6/fff?text=Bizarre+Lineage+Controls",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Bizarre Lineage controls** are highly customizable in settings.
- Prioritize **Health** and **Destructive Power/Energy** for optimal builds.
- **Stand Conjuration** is crucial for unlocking full Stand abilities.
- **Raids** offer valuable tokens for late-game upgrades.
- **Prestige** resets levels but unlocks exclusive items and storage.
</Callout>

Welcome, aspiring Stand users, to the vibrant world of Morioh Cho in Bizarre Lineage! This Roblox RPG, inspired by the iconic JoJo's Bizarre Adventure, offers a rich blend of PvE quests and intense PvP combat. To truly excel, understanding the fundamental **Bizarre Lineage controls** and core gameplay mechanics is paramount. Whether you're a fresh recruit just starting your journey or a seasoned player looking to refine your strategies, mastering movement, combat, and progression systems will significantly enhance your experience. This comprehensive guide will equip you with all the knowledge needed to dominate in 2026, from basic keybinds to advanced Stand Awakening.

<Section icon={Map} title="Mastering Your Movement: Bizarre Lineage Controls & Keybinds">

Effective control over your character is the first step to success in Bizarre Lineage. The game features a standard set of keybinds common to many Roblox RPGs, ensuring a relatively smooth learning curve. However, knowing your evasive maneuvers and Stand abilities by heart can turn the tide in any encounter. All keybinds can be customized within the in-game settings menu to suit your personal playstyle.

**Video Highlights:**
- Basic movement: W, A, S, D for sprinting and navigation.
- Combat basics: M1 (basic attack), M2 (critical attack), F (block).
- Stand interaction: TAB (summon/dismiss), H (ultimate/awakening).
- Evasive actions: Q (dash), G (evade), LCtrl (slide).

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="czBl0lu9AW8" title="FULL Bizarre Lineage Starter GUIDE, Fastest Way to Level Up + EVERYTHING.."/>

Here’s a detailed breakdown of the default Bizarre Lineage controls:

| Action | Keybind | Description |
| :------------------ | :-------- | :---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Movement** | W, A, S, D | Move your character (double-tap W to sprint). |
| **Basic Attack** | M1 | Standard melee attack (Left Click). |
| **Critical Attack** | M2 | Stronger attack with unique animation (Right Click). |
| **Summon Stand** | TAB | Call forth or dismiss your Stand. |
| **Stand Abilities** | E, R, Z, X, C, V | Activate your Stand's unique skills. |
| **Stand Ultimate** | H | Unleash your Stand's most powerful ability (requires Awakening). |
| **Block** | F | Guard against incoming attacks. |
| **Evasive** | G | Perform a quick dodge to avoid damage. |
| **Dash** | Q | Execute a rapid forward movement. |
| **Slide** | LCtrl | Slide across the ground for quick repositioning. |
| **Mount** | B | Summon and ride your mount. |
| **Hotbar** | 1-9 | Use equipped items or switch weapons. |
| **Pose** | P | Strike a stylish pose. |
| **Menu** | M | Access character stats, inventory, and settings. |
| **See The World** | N | Highlight NPCs and objectives on the map. |

<Callout type="tip" title="Pro Tip: Combat Survival">
In early game PvP and boss fights, **Block [F]** and **Evade [G]** are your most critical survival tools. Practice using them effectively to mitigate damage and create openings for counter-attacks. Mastering these defensive **bizarre lineage controls** will greatly improve your survivability.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Strategic Stat Allocation & Progression">

Your character's growth in Bizarre Lineage is heavily influenced by how you allocate Stat Points (SP) and prioritize progression. Understanding each stat's function is key to building a powerful character that aligns with your preferred combat style. You earn SP by leveling up through quests, defeating enemies, and participating in raids.

| Stat Category | Effect | Primary Use |
| :------------ | :---------------------------------- | :---------------------------------------------------- |
| **Strength** | Increases physical attacks. | For non-Stand melee builds. |
| **Health** | Increases maximum HP. | Essential for all builds, especially for survivability. |
| **Power** | Boosts Sub-Ability damage and maximum Power. | For Sub-Ability focused builds (e.g., Hamon, Cyborg). |
| **Weapon** | Increases Slash and Weapon Damage. | For weapon-specific builds (e.g., Kendo fighting style). |
| **Destructive Power** | Enhances Stand's physical attacks. | For Stand-centric melee damage builds. |
| **Destructive Energy** | Boosts Stand's special ability damage. | For Stand-centric skill damage builds. |
| **Worthiness** | Increases luck for better Stand rolls. | Passive stat, improved by using Stand Arrows. |
| **Defense** | Reduces incoming damage. | General survivability, can be boosted by accessories. |

<Callout type="warning" title="Stat Allocation Warning">
While respecs might be available through items or Robux, initial stat choices are significant. Plan your build carefully to avoid wasted points and ensure efficient progression.
</Callout>

Here's a recommended progression priority to optimize your early-game journey:

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Learn Controls">
    Before anything, familiarize yourself with all **Bizarre Lineage controls**, especially combat and evasive keybinds (F, Q, G). This foundation is crucial for all subsequent steps.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Prioritize Health">
    Invest your initial Stat Points heavily into **Health**. High HP ensures you survive early encounters, quests, and boss fights, making the grind much smoother.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Questing & Stand Acquisition">
    Focus on completing quests for XP and your first **Stand Arrow**. Once you acquire a Stand, temporarily invest in **Strength** and **Power** while you evaluate your Stand's rarity and moveset.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Train Stand Conjuration">
    Head to the gym mat (near Bus Stop 2) to train **Conjuration**. This unlocks your Stand's full abilities kit as quickly as possible.
  </Step>
  <Step num="5" title="Pivot to Destructive Stats">
    Once you have a desirable (ideally Legendary or Mythical) Stand, shift your focus to **Destructive Power** and **Destructive Energy** to maximize your Stand's damage output.
  </Step>
  <Step num="6" title="Unlock Awakening & Raids">
    Work towards Level 50 to unlock **Stand Awakening** and start participating in **Raids** with Yoshikage Kira for valuable Raid Tokens.
  </Step>
</Steps>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Unlocking Your Power: Stands, Abilities & Awakening">

Stands are the heart of Bizarre Lineage combat, each offering a unique set of abilities and passive skills. Your journey will involve acquiring Stands, developing their Conjuration, and eventually unlocking their ultimate Awakened forms.

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="Acquiring Stands">
    Stands are obtained using **Stand Arrows**. These can be found as ground spawns, earned from quests, looted from chests, or received via codes. Each arrow provides a random Stand based on rarity.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Stand Storage & Rerolls">
    You can hold up to two Stands at a time. Always use **Stand Settings → Stand Storage → Store Stand** before using a new Stand Arrow to avoid losing your current Stand and its progress. Additional storage slots can be gained through Prestige or purchased with Robux.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

**Stand Conjuration** is your Stand's progression meter, determining which abilities are unlocked. Every Stand begins with limited moves, and you must increase its Conjuration level to access its full moveset.

<Checklist
  id="conjuration-goals"
  title="Fast-Track Conjuration Progress:"
  items={[
    "Train at the gym mat (most efficient early-game method).",
    "Defeat NPCs and enemies (small, consistent gains).",
    "Complete quests (rewards Conjuration alongside XP).",
    "Win PvP fights (significant progress for victories)."
  ]}
/>

### Stand Awakening

Stand Awakening is a crucial mid-game milestone that unlocks at **Level 50** and **100 Stand Conjuration**. It significantly increases your Stand's power, allowing its stats to exceed normal caps and granting access to a powerful Ultimate ability.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Meet Requirements">
    Reach player **Level 50** and achieve **100 Stand Conjuration** for your chosen Stand.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Initiate Awakening Quest">
    Head to the **Gym building** (near Bus Stop 2), sit on a mat, and talk to the NPC. Select "I want to surpass my limits."
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Complete Awakening Quests">
    **Awakening 1**: Defeat Jotaro Kujo, Muhammad Avdol, and DIO in Raids.
    **Awakening 2**: Participate in 50 World Events.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Activate Ultimate">
    Once both quests are complete, you unlock the Stand Awakening (Ultimate) skill, activated with the **H key**.
  </Step>
</Steps>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Combat Styles: Fighting Styles & Sub-Abilities">

Beyond your Stand, Bizarre Lineage offers **Fighting Styles** and **Sub-Abilities** (Specs) to further customize your combat approach. These elements provide unique active moves, passive buffs, and alter your basic attacks or dodges, creating diverse build possibilities.

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="Fighting Styles">
    - **Melee-focused**: Changes M1/M2 attack animations.
    - **3 unique moves**: Each style offers distinct combat skills.
    - **NPC unlocked**: Found by talking to specific trainers.
    - **Examples**: Boxing, Karate, Kendo.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Sub-Abilities (Specs)">
    - **Utility/Support**: Unique dodge visuals, passive buffs.
    - **3 active abilities**: Adds tactical options.
    - **NPC/Item unlocked**: Some require specific items.
    - **Examples**: Hamon, Cyborg, Vampire, Spin.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

### Fighting Styles

| Fighting Style | Moves | How to Unlock |
| :------------- | :------------------------------------ | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Boxing** | White Fang, Liver Crusher, Dempsey Roll | Talk to the **Boxing Coach** on the upper floor of the Gym (Bus Stop 2). |
| **Karate** | Sixth Massacre, Seiken Barrage, Tatsumaki | Talk to the **Karate Sensei** near the Hospital (Bus Stop 15). |
| **Kendo** | Whirlwind (Ground/Aerial), Silent Edge, Rising Tempest | Talk to the **Samurai Master** inside Kame Yu Market (Bus Stop 15). |

### Sub-Abilities (Specs)

| Sub-Ability | Moves | Passive Bonuses | How to Get |
| :---------- | :---------------------------------------------------- | :------------------------------ | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Hamon** | Sunlight Yellow Overdrive, Sendo Ripple Overdrive, Scarlet Overdrive | Passive HP regeneration. | Talk to the **Ancient Ghost** near Bus Stop 13 and complete his quest. |
| **Cyborg** | Ultraviolet Radiation Apparatus, Missile Volley, Machine Gun | +15% Defense, reduces incoming damage. | Talk to **Rudol von Stroheim** near Bus Stop 3 and complete his quest. |
| **Vampire** | Space Ripper Stingy Eyes, Leeching Terror, Flash Freeze | Passive HP regeneration. | Use a **Vampire Mask** item, then talk to the **Elder Vampire** in Dio's Chapel and complete his quest. |
| **Spin** | Ricochet, Cyclone Breaker, Corkscrew | (Details pending) | (Currently TBA) |

<Callout type="success" title="Beginner's Choice: Hamon">
For new players, **Hamon (Ripple)** is highly recommended. It's easy to unlock, provides valuable HP regeneration, and complements most Stands and Fighting Styles effectively, offering a well-rounded early-game advantage.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="End-Game & Advanced Progression: Raids & Prestige">

Once you've grasped the fundamental **Bizarre Lineage controls** and established a solid character build, the next step is to delve into advanced progression systems like Raids and Prestige. These features offer significant rewards and avenues for long-term character development.

### Raids

Raids are challenging boss fights against powerful JoJo-inspired characters, offering some of the most valuable rewards in Bizarre Lineage. Starting them early is crucial for accumulating Raid Tokens.

| Raid Feature | Description |
| :----------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Access** | Talk to **Yoshikage Kira** in Morioh Cho to access and enter Raid fights. |
| **Rewards** | **Raid Tokens** (for Raid Store purchases), **Stand Arrows**, Cosmetics, Weapons. |
| **Raid Store** | Spend Raid Tokens on Stand Stat Essences, accessories, and perks. |
| **Cosmetics** | Note that cosmetics often apply both a buff and a debuff; choose carefully. |

<Callout type="info" title="Raid Strategy">
Raid Tokens are invaluable for late-game upgrades. Begin participating in Raids as soon as your character is strong enough, even if you need to team up with others. The consistent stream of tokens will accelerate your build optimization.
</Callout>

### Prestige

Prestiging allows you to reset your character's levels once you reach the maximum level, in exchange for access to the exclusive Prestige Shop and additional benefits.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Reach Max Level & Cash">
    Achieve the maximum player level (currently Level 50) and have **10,000 Cash** in your inventory.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Locate Arch Mage NPC">
    Travel to the **TC Hospital** (Bus Stop 10) and interact with the **Arch Mage NPC**.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Initiate Prestige">
    Confirm your decision to Prestige. Your level will reset, but your Stands and their progress will carry over.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Reap Benefits">
    Each Prestige level grants **5 Prestige points** (for exclusive items in the Prestige Shop) and **one free Stand Storage slot**. You can Prestige up to three times.
  </Step>
</Steps>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "How do I get my first Stand in Bizarre Lineage?",
    answer: "You get your first Stand Arrow early in the game by completing initial quests. Use it from your inventory to receive a random Stand. Further arrows can be farmed from ground spawns, quests, chests, and codes."
  },
  {
    question: "What are the most important Bizarre Lineage controls for combat?",
    answer: "Beyond basic movement and attacks, mastering your defensive controls like Block [F], Dash [Q], and Evade [G] is crucial. These allow you to mitigate damage and position yourself effectively in fights."
  },
  {
    question: "Which stats should I prioritize when leveling up?",
    answer: "Initially, focus on **Health** for survivability. Once you have a good Stand, pivot to **Destructive Power** and **Destructive Energy** to maximize your Stand's damage output. **Power** is important for Sub-Ability users."
  },
  {
    question: "How can I get more Stand Storage slots?",
    answer: "You can unlock additional Stand Storage slots by increasing your **Prestige level** or by purchasing them directly from the Robux shop (398 Robux per slot)."
  }
]} />

</Section>
